chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-331 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.08.2024 Mr. Shoukat Ali Pathan advocate for applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI, J Through this application applicant seeks post- arrest bail in F.I.R. No.146/2023 registered at P.S. B-Section Dadu U/s 201, 217, 218, 120-B, 506 PPC 155-A, Police Order 2002. His earlier bail application was dismissed by the learned Special Judge Anti-Corruption (Provincial), Hyderabad vide order dated 29.03.2024. 2. It is case of applicant that earlier he filed bail application before the trial court the same was declined and thereafter approached this court which was withdrawn vide order dated 19.02.2024. Thereafter, the second bail application on the same grounds was presented before the trial court and it was dismissed vide order dated 29.03.2024. 2. Counsel for the applicant has agitated all the grounds which were already taken in the previous bail application and after withdrawal of the same no fresh ground is agitated. When was confronted with the maintainability of this bail application in view of the judgment of Supreme Court in the case of MUHAMMAD NAWAZ v. The State (PLD 2021 Supreme Court 809) learned counsel has nothing to controvert the legal position and the trial court has also in the impugned order while discussing the entire facts has found no fresh ground after dismissal of bail application from this court. 3. Under such circumstances, bail application is not maintainable and is dismissed. JUDGE Ali Haider
